response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff/Senior Engineer with over 15 years of experience, making him vastly overqualified for this explicitly entry-level to mid-level role. While his technical expertise perfectly matches the required stack (TypeScript, React, AWS, LLMs), his seniority level, compensation expectations, and career trajectory do not align with a junior position. Furthermore, his current location may conflict with the strict on-site requirement.
strengths: Extensive expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational databases.
Strong background in clean software architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
Possesses valuable nice-to-have experience with LLM integration, AWS, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level to mid-level role, having held Staff and Senior titles for years.
High risk of misalignment regarding compensation expectations and day-to-day responsibilities.
Current location (Lagos/Berlin) may conflict with the high on-site presence requirement.
